title: kohleria villosa
intro: Kohleria villosa, also known as the hairy kohleria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is primarily found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The hairy kohleria has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It can be used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions that are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing.
